description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these Puma Tenkan shoes are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. The shoes are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperSynthetic upper with a strap at the midfoot for a customised FitMidfoot straps have a Velcro closureForm stripes at the side that also act as overlaysTerraced grooves at the toe regionReinforced overlay at the heelMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for added comfortOutsoleTerraced lugs at the outsole with a suction point at the big toe areashoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
